plays.summary: Bryce Elder (ATL, xFIP 4.57) is league-average on the mound, creating a clear vulnerability for BOS's offense to exploit. BOS's bullpen has logged 14 relief innings over two days, and the park (PF 102) tilts hitter-friendly. No line is posted yet, but the medium-confidence model signal projects 10.0 runs — watch for a over opportunity when odds open.

Cold conditions at first pitch (47°F) are the primary drag on scoring — the ball dies in cold air and pitchers typically maintain grip and command better. Starters are similarly matched (Trevor Rogers 4.07 / Carmen Mlodzinski 4.06 xFIP), and PIT's bullpen has logged 8 relief innings over two days. No line is posted yet, but the medium-confidence model signal projects 8.1 runs — watch for a under opportunity when odds open.

No line is posted yet, but the medium-confidence model signal projects 10.3 runs — watch for a over opportunity when odds open.
